title: Democratic Party fissures are shaping Michigan’s crucial Senate primary
description: The race is the next, and perhaps biggest, battle between the Democrats’ warring factions.

title: A Florida airport is officially renamed for Trump. What does he stand to gain?
description: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes.

title: Campaign staffers keep trying to bet on races despite push to curb insider trading
description: Kalshi says it has blocked "dozens" of trades from campaign insiders, but experts say the company's approach leaves lots of potential loopholes. NPR has found at least one trade that slipped through.

title: Trump returns to U.S. in old Air Force One, raising questions about security
description: In a surprise switch, President Trump left Turkey in an older Air Force One plane instead of the Boeing 787 luxury jet donated by Qatar last year, raising questions about security and retrofits.

title: Rahm Emanuel criticizes Netanyahu in speech in Tel Aviv
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with potential Democratic presidential candidate Rahm Emanuel about his remarks at Tel Aviv University.

title: Democrats search for new candidate after Platner announces he's suspending campaign
description: Democrats are searching for a new path forward in Maine after Graham Platner announced he was suspending his campaign for U.S. Senate.

title: 9 possible candidates who could replace Platner on Maine’s ballot
description: Will Democrats choose another progressive nominee or distance themselves from Graham Platner’s wing of the party amid his scandals?

title: Maine Democrats don’t seem eager for an endorsement from Graham Platner
description: The Post asked would-be replacement candidates whether they wanted the support of Platner, under fire over a sexual assault allegation. Four responded, in the negative.

title: Graham Platner drops his bid for Senate after facing an allegation of rape
description: Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support.

title: After Greenland bluster, Trump surprises NATO allies with praise
description: The president embraced the alliance in a meeting Wednesday, extolling member nations’ defense spending and saying nothing about the Danish territory, officials said.

title: Former Maine official considers how to replace Platner
description: NPR's Mary Louise Kelly speaks with Nirav Shah, a former Democratic gubernatorial candidate in Maine, about what's next following Graham Platner's expected departure from the state's U.S. Senate race.

title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal how their books add to their income
description: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.

title: New U.S. passports with Trump's image are available. Here's how to get (or avoid) one
description: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

title: Inspiration for Trump's arch was sparked long before the design was first approved
description: The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.

title: Questions remain about defense strategy for man accused of killing Charlie Kirk
description: A preliminary hearing to establish whether there is enough evidence against Tyler James Robinson for the case to proceed to trial enters Day 3 in Utah.

title: U.S. and Iran launch fresh strikes following attacks on commercial ships
description: Iran said it had targeted more than 80 U.S. military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, after the U.S. launched strikes in response to attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Ex-girlfriend of Graham Platner says he removed condoms without consent during sex
description: The campaign for the Democratic Senate candidate in Maine called the allegation “categorically false and politically motivated.”

title: Democratic factions vie to pick Platner replacement before he leaves Maine race
description: Potential candidates and their backers moved quickly to gain an edge in the contest over who would replace Graham Platner if he exits the key Senate race.

title: Maine voters, once loyal to Platner, abandon him after sexual assault allegation
description: Some voters said they stuck with the progressive candidate through several controversies, but drew the line after a new allegation of sex assault.

title: Supreme Court justices to make rare appearance before Congress
description: Elena Kagan and Amy Coney Barrett, a liberal and a conservative, are set to testify before a House subcommittee next Tuesday.

title: U.S. gave Tehran details on Iranian asylum seekers, lawsuit alleges
description: The claim, outlined in court papers, contends information shared with Iran could jeopardize the lives of pro-democracy protesters, religious minorities and LGTBQ people.

title: What Graham Platner’s rise and unraveling reveal about the politics of 2026
description: In their rush to find a strong candidate to run against Sen. Susan Collins (R-Maine), Democrats should have more thoroughly vetted their party's nominee.

title: 6 potential replacements for Graham Platner if he drops out of Senate race
description: The Maine Democrat has faced an escalating string of scandals as he competes for a critical Senate seat that could determine control of the chamber.
